installation.title: Momei Blog Installation Wizard
installation.subtitle: Finish the minimum setup first so the site can boot quickly.

languagePrompt.title: Confirm the installation language first
languagePrompt.description: If the current copy is hard to read, switch language before continuing with the wizard.

healthCheck.title: Environment Check
healthCheck.description: Confirm the environment is ready before continuing.
healthCheck.nodeVersionWarning: Node.js version is low. It is recommended to use v20 or higher for best stability.

database.title: Database Initialization
database.description: Create the base tables required for installation.
database.error: Failed to initialize database, please check your configuration

siteConfig.title: Site Configuration
siteConfig.description: Fill in the public-facing basics first.

adminAccount.title: Create Admin Account
adminAccount.description: Create the first administrator for follow-up settings.
adminAccount.name: Name

preview.title: Optional Features
preview.description: These capabilities can all be completed later in system settings.

setupChecklist.title: Initial Setup Checklist

summary.production: Finish the minimum settings that affect site availability first, then continue the rest in system settings.
summary.demo: Follow the demo-first path now and leave real deployment settings for the formal environment.

setupChecklist.laterHint: Storage, AI, and notifications do not need to be finished here in one pass. You can continue them from system settings after installation.

description.production: The installation wizard only covers the minimum setup needed to boot the site. Authentication, notifications, AI, and storage strategy should be finalized in the admin panel after installation.
description.demo: Demo mode is optimized for a 3-5 minute product tour. Complete real deployment settings after you leave the demo experience.

immediate.title: Configure Now
immediate.description: These items directly affect first-run accessibility, administrator ownership, and public-facing basics.

later.title: Configure Later
later.description: These capabilities are easier to finish in the admin panel once the site is already reachable.

contexts.wizardLocale: Wizard / Default language + After install / Profile timezone
contexts.wizardSeo: Wizard / Site configuration + After install / Analytics
contexts.postDemoIntegrations: After demo / Admin settings / AI and integrations

siteIdentity.title: Site identity
siteIdentity.description: Set the site name, public URL, and baseline introduction first so links, branding, and homepage copy are usable from day one.

localeTimezone.title: Language and timezone
localeTimezone.description: Choose the default locale during installation, then fill in your personal timezone after login to keep UI language and timestamps aligned.

adminAccess.title: Admin ownership and access
adminAccess.description: Create the first administrator account and confirm how you will recover access before the site enters real operation.

seoVisibility.title: SEO and public visibility
seoVisibility.description: Capture the site description, keywords, and canonical URL now, then continue with analytics scripts and verification settings in admin later.

authExperience.title: Sign-in and registration policy
authExperience.description: Finalize OAuth, anonymous access, captcha, and security policies in admin before deciding how the public can enter the site.

storageDelivery.title: Object storage and asset delivery
storageDelivery.description: Choose local storage, S3, or R2 based on your deployment environment, and normalize asset prefixes before media starts to accumulate.

aiWorkflow.title: AI providers and budgets
aiWorkflow.description: Connect real models, API keys, and default models after installation, then open capabilities gradually based on cost and permission policy.

notifications.title: Notification delivery
notifications.description: Configure in-app, email, and browser push together in admin after you decide which high-value events are worth delivering.

demoPublic.title: Start with the sample content
demoPublic.description: Use the homepage and seeded articles to understand the public information architecture, theming, and multilingual reading flow.

demoCreator.title: Open the creator experience
demoCreator.description: Jump straight into the editor with the demo account to try AI-assisted writing, translation, and publishing.

demoLocale.title: Switch locales and browse paths
demoLocale.description: Use language switching, search, and the post list to feel locale fallback and content discovery behavior.

demoProductionIdentity.title: Complete real site metadata later
demoProductionIdentity.description: Demo site settings are sample data only. Before a real deployment, revisit general settings and confirm the brand, URL, and baseline copy.

demoIntegrations.title: Connect real integrations after demo
demoIntegrations.description: Avoid mixing production AI, storage, and email credentials into the demo journey. Finish those integrations after you leave demo mode.

demoNotifications.title: Enable notifications in the real environment
demoNotifications.description: Set up email and browser push only in a real environment, once domain, VAPID or SMTP, and delivery scope are confirmed.

complete.title: Installation Complete
complete.description: Congratulations! Momei Blog has been successfully installed
complete.envHint: To prevent reinstallation, please add the following to your environment variables:

handoffDescription.production: The site is now usable. The following items are better completed in admin after installation instead of expanding the wizard further.
handoffDescription.demo: The demo journey is ready. Use these entry points first, then decide which capabilities should become real deployment settings.
